PostToolUse.command: python3 -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse(open(sys.argv[1]).read())" "$FILEPATH" 2>&1 || echo 'SYNTAX ERROR — fix before continuing'
PostToolUse.description: Syntax-check Python files after every edit

PostToolUse.command: grep -n 'import requests' "$FILEPATH" && echo 'WARNING: Use httpx instead of requests (see CLAUDE.md)' || true

PreCommit.command: grep -rn 'import requests' --include='*.py' . && echo 'BLOCKED: Replace requests with httpx before committing' && exit 1 || true

grep -rn 'f".*{.*}.*sql\|f".*{.*}.*SQL\|f".*{.*}.*SELECT\|f".*{.*}.*INSERT\|f".*{.*}.*UPDATE\|f".*{.*}.*DELETE' --include='*.py' . && echo 'WARNING: Possible SQL injection — review f-strings in SQL' || true

PostCommit.command:
echo '
=== REMINDER: Update CLAUDE.md LEARNED rules if this commit fixes a bug ==='
PostCommit.description: Remind to update LEARNED rules after each commit
